blocks.text: Rory McIlroy wins the Masters. Champions League bedlam starts Tuesday.
🎾 09:00 — Ruud opens Barcelona Open on home clay — where he belongs
Barcelona need a miracle at Atlético's fortress. Liverpool must flip a 0-2 deficit at Anfield. Arsenal protect a slender lead; Bayern host Real Madrid up 2-1. Four ties, none safe.

blocks.label: ⚽ CL Second Legs
items: Tue 21:00 — Atlético Madrid vs Barcelona [★5] — Barça 2-0 down, mission impossible?
Tue 21:00 — Liverpool vs PSG [★5] — Anfield comeback needed, 0-2 deficit
Wed 21:00 — Arsenal vs Sporting CP [★4] — 1-0 lead, one lapse ends it
Wed 21:00 — Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid [★5] — Bayern 2-1 up, Madrid never die
